case_title: GOLD CLUB ET AL VS. KENT RICHARD DERUSHA

docket_entries.description: REMARK: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO BRETT LEO ON 08/15/16 RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-15-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-03-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT DERUSHA, KENT RICHARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLD CLUB LEO, BRETT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DERUSHA, KENT RICHARD $2,986.75 PRINCIPAL, $387.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,374.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
